text:
After quit opera is crashed, log is not present.

uname -a
FreeBSD 8.1-STABLE #0: Wed Aug 11 00:47:10 EEST 2010

opera --version
Opera 10.61. Build 6430 for FreeBSD.
Compiled on Aug  9 2010 by gcc 4.3.5 20091227 (prerelease) (ABI: 1002).

make showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for opera-10.61.6430:
     CUPS=off "Enable support for printing (requires CUPS)"
     VIDEO=on "Enable support for HTML5 video (requires GStreamer)"
     GTK=off "Use GTK backend"
     QT4=on "Use Qt4 backend"
     KDE4=off "Use KDE4 backend"
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings

How-To-Repeat: Quit from opera browser  :)
